ValidationRule.description: an Opportunity that needs Deal Desk discount approval can't be Closed Won until it is approved. Keys off the trigger-stamped Discount_Approval_Status__c; the Bypass_Opportunity_Validation permission overrides.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Opportunity requires Deal Desk discount approval and cannot be Closed Won until the discount is approved (or overridden with the Bypass Opportunity Validation permission).
